debug_info.goal:
Hist : History
X : Sequent
tab : Tableau Hist X
Hist✝ : History
X✝ : Sequent
nrep✝ : ¬rep Hist✝ X✝
nbas✝ : ¬X✝.basic
lt✝ : LocalTableau X✝
next✝ : (Y : Sequent) → Y ∈ endNodesOf lt✝ → Tableau (X✝ :: Hist✝) Y
Y✝ : Sequent
Y_in✝ : Y✝ ∈ endNodesOf lt✝
tail✝ : PathIn (next✝ Y✝ Y_in✝)
IH : tail✝.flip.flip = ⋯ ▸ cast ⋯ tail✝
⊢ loc ⋯ (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝.flip).flip) = ⋯ ▸ cast ⋯ (loc Y_in✝ tail✝)

      simp [flip]
    have h₂ : (cast (cast tail✝.flip).flip) = (cast tail✝) := by
